title: Projekt Manager POS Werbemittelsteuerung (all genders)
required_skills: German language proficiency (implicit — full German-language client environment)
matched_skills: Project management (Agile: Scrum, SAFe) — maps to Projektsteuerung
Cross-functional influence and coordination — maps to interne Teams koordinieren
Budget tracking ($8M programme at HSBC) — maps to Budget- und Timing-Einhaltung
MBA with marketing focus (Leuphana) — maps to Studium Marketing/Medienwirtschaft
Product Marketing Manager experience — maps to Marketing background requirement
Jira / Confluence / structured sprint tracking — maps to Strukturierte Arbeitsweise
SQL (basic) + MS Power BI — partial match to Datenpflege/Datenbankmanagement
German B2 — partial match to German-language workplace requirement
missing_skills: POS / Werbemittel domain knowledge (advertising materials at point of sale — niche area not evidenced in CV)
Reinzeichnung / Druckvorstufe / print production quality control process knowledge
German fluency (C1/C2) — role involves direct Deutsche Telekom client contact entirely in German; B2 is a gap
Experience with advertising/marketing asset management software or DAM systems
Vertriebskanal / retail shop landscape analysis experience
core_responsibilities: Aussteuerung der POS-Werbemittel für den Kunden Deutsche Telekom (end-to-end advertising material delivery)
Projektsteuerung vom Briefing bis Qualitätskontrolle nach Reinzeichnung, inkl. Budget- und Timing-Verantwortung
Enge Kundenabstimmung mit Deutsche Telekom bei der Projektumsetzung
Betreuung des Digitalisierungsprozesses und Einführung neuer Prozesssoftware für Werbemittelsteuerung
Analyse der Vertriebskanäle und Shoplandschaften sowie Entwicklung und Pflege eines neuen Tools
recommended_emphasis: Emphasize project coordination and milestone/budget tracking experience from HSBC PMO ($8M programme) and Hapag-Lloyd
Highlight cross-functional coordination and acting as central client interface — directly relevant to Deutsche Telekom liaison duties
Frame MBA marketing coursework and Product Marketing Manager titles to address the Marketing/Medienwirtschaft education requirement
Mention any experience with process digitisation or tool introduction (new software rollout) to match the Digitalisierungsprozess responsibility
Acknowledge German B2 and any German-language work experience explicitly; this role is a stretch at B2 — flag the language risk

company_info.size_raw: No company size information found in JD text
